descFull: Fully uncensored, capability-enhanced abliteration of Qwen3.6-27B. NVFP4 + z-lab DFlash speculative decoding (n=12) on the unified ghcr.io/aeon-7/aeon-vllm-ultimate:latest container, tuned for long-context draft acceptance on DGX Spark. 6 HF variants (BF16/NVFP4/MTP/MTP-XS), docker-compose, and QuickStart.
